display: Maya — Cosmic illusion; the veil that makes the One appear as many.
Mantra — Sacred word or phrase used in meditation and devotion.
Master Mahasaya — Author of The Gospel of Sri Ramakrishna. Mentioned in Autobiography.
Mahavatar Babaji — Deathless guru. Revived and transmitted Kriya Yoga to Lahiri Mahasaya.

text: Materializing a Palace in the Himalayas

display: Mahatma Gandhi — Leader of Indian independence. Yogananda met him at Wardha ashram.
